features.name: Projects
features.purpose: Manage construction CRM projects and subprojects from the Projects list and project detail pages.
navigationPath: Header → plus (+) button → New project modal

creationFlow.summary: Create a parent project from the Projects list using the header plus (+) button.

steps.description: Open the Projects view.
Select the plus (+) button in the header.
Complete the New project modal and submit.

editFlow.summary: Edit an existing project from project detail.

steps.description: Open a project from the Projects list.
Open the Edit project drawer/modal and save changes.

deleteFlow.summary: Delete a project from the Projects list actions menu with confirmation.

steps.description: Open the project row actions menu on the Projects list.
Choose Delete project and confirm in the destructive confirmation workflow.

formFields.label: City
formFields.validation: City can only contain letters, spaces, hyphens, apostrophes, and periods.

formFields.label: Balance is calculated from unpaid payment milestones.

validation: City can only contain letters, spaces, hyphens, apostrophes, and periods.
Zip code must be exactly 5 digits.
relationships: Subprojects belong to parent projects
Projects link to contacts/clients
Projects contain workflow tasks, payments, budget entries, and documents
limitations: Project creation is not available in this environment.
Project deletion is not available in this environment.

features.name: Workflow Tasks
features.purpose: Track and complete workflow tasks grouped by pipeline stage on a project.
navigationPath: Open project → Workflow tasks section or /projects/{slug}/tasks

creationFlow.summary: Add a workflow task to a project stage from the Workflow tasks section.

steps.description: Open Workflow tasks on a project.
Choose Add task, pick a pipeline stage, and save.

editFlow.summary: Edit an existing workflow task from the task row actions or drawer.

steps.description: Open task actions and choose Edit task.
Update fields and save.

deleteFlow.summary: Delete (archive) a workflow task with confirmation.

steps.description: Open task actions and choose Delete task.
Confirm deletion.

relationships: Tasks belong to projects and pipeline stages
Tasks may require documents
Payment milestone tasks link to payments feature

features.name: Payments
features.purpose: Track payment milestones and collected amounts on project financials.

creationFlow.summary: Add a payment milestone from the Payments section.

steps.description: Open Payments on a project.
Choose Add payment milestone and save.
Open milestone drawer and save changes.

relationships: Payment milestones appear in Payments section and may exist as payment-type workflow tasks
Project Value / Collected / Balance shown on project detail

features.name: Budget
features.purpose: Add and track budget line items and costs on a project.

creationFlow.summary: Add a budget item from the Budget table.

steps.description: Open Budget on a project.
Choose Add budget item, enter details, and save.

editFlow.summary: Edit budget items inline in the Budget table.

steps.description: Update budget item fields and save.

deleteFlow.summary: Delete a budget item with confirmation.

steps.description: Choose Delete budget item and confirm.

relationships: Budget entries belong to projects
Budget entries may require documents

features.name: Documents
features.purpose: Upload and review project documents, including task-required and budget-required files.

creationFlow.summary: Upload documents to a project from the Documents section or attach files to workflow tasks when permitted.

steps.description: Open Documents on a project.
Upload files using the project documents upload control.

deleteFlow.summary: Delete a document from a task or project when permitted.

steps.description: Use document delete action.

relationships: Documents belong to projects
Documents may be required by workflow tasks or budget entries

features.name: Customers
features.purpose: Store customer and contact details on projects; lead capture collects contact data into projects.

creationFlow.summary: Customer/contact data is captured during project create or lead capture submission.

steps.description: Enter contact fields on New project or lead capture form.

editFlow.summary: Update contact details from Edit project.

steps.description: Edit project contact fields and save.

formFields.label: Balance is calculated from unpaid payment milestones.

relationships: Contacts/clients link to projects
Lead capture creates or updates CRM contacts/projects

features.name: Workflow Settings
features.purpose: Configure organization pipeline stages and customer task alerts.
navigationPath: Tabs → Workflow Stages | Customer Task Alerts

editFlow.summary: Customize workflow stages and customer task reminder settings at the organization level.

steps.description: Open Workflow Settings from the sidebar.
Use Workflow Stages or Customer Task Alerts tabs.

relationships: Pipeline stages drive project stage and workflow task grouping
Customer task alerts relate to workflow tasks

features.name: Reports
features.purpose: View CRM reports and export organization data.
relationships: Reports aggregate project, payment, and activity data

features.name: Permissions
features.purpose: Control BuildCore role capabilities and member visibility for workflow tasks, payments, and budget.
whereItExists: Teams → Permissions tabs (Task, Payment, Budget permissions)

editFlow.summary: Adjust role-based permissions and member visibility toggles on Teams permission tabs.

steps.description: Open Teams and choose a permissions tab.

relationships: Permissions apply to organization members with BuildCore roles
Visibility rules affect workflow tasks, payments, and budget views
limitations: Permission changes are view-only in the interactive demo.
Permission editing will be available in a future release.
Team management is view-only in the interactive demo.
Workflow assignment and approval rules (coming soon).

features.name: Team Members
features.purpose: View organization members, BuildCore access, and roles on the Teams page.

creationFlow.summary: Invite organization members through organization membership flows (Zenformed organization APIs).

steps.description: Open Teams and review organization membership table.

editFlow.summary: Toggle BuildCore access and assign BuildCore roles for members when permitted.

steps.description: Use BuildCore access toggle and role controls on the Members table.

relationships: Organization membership is separate from BuildCore access
Members can be assigned to projects and workflow tasks
limitations: Permission changes are view-only in the interactive demo.
Permission editing will be available in a future release.
Team management is view-only in the interactive demo.
Workflow assignment and approval rules (coming soon).
